name: Xero MCP Server
description: This is a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server implementation for Xero. It provides a bridge between the MCP protocol and Xero's API, allowing for standardized access to Xero's accounting and business features.

env.name: XERO_CLIENT_ID
env.description: Client ID for Xero OAuth2 authentication

env.name: XERO_CLIENT_SECRET
env.description: Client secret for Xero OAuth2 authentication

env.name: XERO_CLIENT_BEARER_TOKEN
env.description: Bearer token for authentication, takes precedence over client ID/secret
